article_metadata.title: Ban 'forever chemicals' in uniforms and frying pans, MPs urge

questions.question: What is the main purpose of the MPs' recommendation mentioned in the article?

options.A: To expand the industrial use of PFAS in essential sectors
options.B: To prohibit all uses of PFAS immediately without exception
options.C: To phase out non-essential PFAS uses unless they can be justified
options.D: To replace government regulation with voluntary industry action

questions.explanation: 文章核心信息是委员会建议逐步淘汰非必要 PFAS 用途，除非企业能够证明其确有必要或无替代品，因此 C 正确。A 与原文方向相反，B 过度绝对化，D 与文中强调强制规则而非行业自律相矛盾。

questions.question: Why are PFAS called 'forever chemicals'?

options.A: Because they are cheap to manufacture in large quantities
options.B: Because they remain in the environment for a very long time
options.C: Because they are widely used in historical buildings
options.D: Because they can be safely recycled forever

questions.explanation: 文中明确解释 forever chemicals 之所以得名，是因为它们会在生态系统中长期存在并累积，所以 B 正确。A、C、D 都不是命名原因，其中 D 还与原文担忧其难以降解相冲突。

questions.question: What criticism did the committee make of the government's PFAS plan?

options.A: It focuses too much on monitoring instead of prevention and clean-up
options.B: It ignores the needs of the medical sector completely
options.C: It depends too heavily on support from the EU
options.D: It bans PFAS in school uniforms too quickly

questions.explanation: 委员会认为政府计划过度聚焦扩大监测，而不是防止污染和治理污染，因此 A 正确。B、C、D 都不是文章中委员会提出的批评点。

questions.question: Which of the following best reflects the attitude of industry groups toward the proposed ban?

options.A: They fully support it because it will reduce costs
options.B: They oppose it because some applications still bring practical benefits
options.C: They are indifferent because PFAS are no longer profitable
options.D: They welcome it only for medical equipment and firefighting foam

questions.explanation: 行业团体认为全面禁止某些应用并不是正确做法，例如不粘锅禁用后可能导致食物浪费，因此 B 正确。A、C、D 都不符合原文对行业态度的描述。

vocabulary.example: Public concern may persist if the pollution problem remains unsolved.
Toxic substances can accumulate in soil and water over time.
Manufacturers must demonstrate that safer alternatives are unavailable.
Clean drinking water is essential to public health.
The town demanded a remediation plan for the contaminated land.
The policy disproportionately affects low-income families.
The government plans to phase out outdated energy systems.
Scientists are studying whether the material is carcinogenic.
The company acknowledged the risks but defended its product design.
Without innovation, smaller firms may fall behind global competitors.

syntax_analysis.original: School uniforms and non-stick pans are some of the everyday products that are treated with a group of chemicals, called PFAS, to make them stain and water resistant.
syntax_analysis.breakdown: 主干是 School uniforms and non-stick pans are some of the everyday products。that are treated with a group of chemicals 是定语从句，修饰 products；called PFAS 是过去分词短语作补充说明；to make them stain and water resistant 表示目的。
syntax_analysis.translation: 校服和不粘锅是日常用品中的一部分，这些产品会经过一类名为 PFAS 的化学物质处理，以使其具备防污和防水性能。

syntax_analysis.original: But there is growing concern about the long-term environmental and health impacts of some of these "forever chemicals" - so called because they persist and accumulate across ecosystems.
syntax_analysis.breakdown: 主句是 But there is growing concern。about the long-term environmental and health impacts of some of these 'forever chemicals' 是介词短语说明担忧内容；so called because... 是插入说明，解释其名称来源；because 引导原因状语从句。
syntax_analysis.translation: 但是，人们越来越担心其中一些“永久化学物质”带来的长期环境和健康影响，这类物质之所以被这样称呼，是因为它们会在生态系统中持续存在并不断积累。

syntax_analysis.original: A group of MPs has now called for a complete ban on their use, unless manufacturers can demonstrate they are either essential for their product or there is no alternative chemical.
syntax_analysis.breakdown: 主句是 A group of MPs has now called for a complete ban on their use。unless 引导条件状语从句；manufacturers can demonstrate 后面省略了 that；they are either essential... or there is no alternative chemical 是并列的表语或存在结构，用来说明例外条件。
syntax_analysis.translation: 如今，一组议员呼吁全面禁止使用这类化学物质，除非制造商能够证明，它们对产品而言确属必要，或者根本不存在可替代的化学品。
